params.name: Eye of Medusa
params.description:
On Mar 12, 1800 BC, Medusa received Athena's wrath who turned her into a monster with serpents on her head.
Even with swan wings on her back and winding serpents on her head, Medusa was still a ravishing beauty. No one could escape the power of her beauty. Staring into those deep blue eyes will make one lose their soul and turn into stone. [Medusa's Family] Father: Phorcys; mother: Ceto; sisters: Euryale, Hesperides and Stheno; son: Pegasus and Chrysaor.
